title: CustomerCampaignMetricTypeValues
description: Metrics and KPIs used to evaluate customer campaigns

x-enumeration-literals.name: Click-Through Rates (CTR)
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Formula: (Number of Clicks / Number of Impressions) x 100
Indicates the effectiveness of an ad in generating interest.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Conversion Rate
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Formula: (Number of Conversions / Number of Total Visitors) x 100
Measures the percentage of users who take the desired action (e.g., make a purchase).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Customer Acquisition Cost (CAC)
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Formula: Total Campaign Costs / Number of New Customers Acquired
Indicates the cost to acquire a new customer.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Return On Investment (ROI)
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Formula: (Net Profit / Campaign Cost) x 100
Measures the profitability of the campaign.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Customer Lifetime Value (CLV)
x-enumeration-literals.description: Estimates the total revenue a business can expect from a single customer account.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Engagement Rate
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Formula: (Total Engagements / Total Impressions) x 100
Measures how actively users are engaging with the campaign content.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Bounce Rate
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Formula: (Single Page Sessions / Total Sessions) x 100
Indicates the percentage of visitors who leave the site after viewing only one page.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Repeat Purchase Rate
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Formula: (Number of Returning Customers / Total Number of Customers) x 100
Indicates the percentage of customers who make more than one purchase

x-enumeration-literals.name: Churn Rate
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Formula: (Number of Customers Lost / Total Number of Customers at Start of Period) x 100
Measures the rate at which customers stop doing business with the company.
